title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for downloading, running and chatting with 70+ open-source LLMs locally (Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, etc.).

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama API—works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and push models with a few lines of code.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder APIs and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for chatting with Ollama models from Rails or plain Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app that streams responses from a local Ollama server.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with syntax highlighting, history and chat sessions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models for generative and embedding nodes.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama with Blazor sample and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that brings Ollama models into your editor for code explanation and generation.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to run Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit for PDF Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama replies into any channel with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that answers questions using local Ollama models with thread streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs via Ollama for note summarization and brainstorming.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile collection for fine-tuned, quantized and specialized models.
